title: MiniMax M2.7: Run AI Agents for $20/Month?
summary: MiniMax M2.7 is a language model service positioned for cost-effective AI agent operation, claiming 80% cost reduction versus OpenAI and DeepSeek while maintaining performance on tasks like social media drafting, translation, API scheduling, and image generation. The video reviews M2.7 integration with OpenClaw, Hermes, and Claude Code workflows with real-world testing.
